meta.description: NEXUS CDM ground truth v3: aw_sales + aw_humanresources + aw_person + aw_production + aw_purchasing. New entities: address, state_province, country_region, unit_measure, location, scrap_reason, product_photo, product_bom, product_vendor, ship_method, shift, job_candidate. Policies: rowguid dropped; modifieddate dropped where temporal anchor exists; credentials out-of-CDM; binary blobs referenced, not stored.

db_stores.es: Elasticsearch — kNN semantic search; surface fields + embedding narrative
db_stores.neo4j: Neo4j — property graph; entity relationship traversal
db_stores.ref: Operational DB (PostgreSQL) — lookup/reference; fetched live by query engine
db_stores.excluded: Not stored in any AI store — PII/sensitive/binary; fetched live from source only
